hooks.command: FILE=$(echo "$CODEX_TOOL_INPUT" | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get('file_path',''))" 2>/dev/null); REPO=$(git -C "$(dirname "$FILE")" rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$REPO" ] && [ -f "$REPO/backend/pyproject.toml" ] && echo "$FILE" | grep -q '/backend/.*\.py$'; then uv run --project "$REPO/backend" ruff check --fix "$FILE" 2>/dev/null || true; fi

FILE=$(echo "$CODEX_TOOL_INPUT" | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get('file_path',''))" 2>/dev/null); REPO=$(git -C "$(dirname "$FILE")" rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$REPO" ] && [ -f "$REPO/frontend/package.json" ] && echo "$FILE" | grep -qE '/frontend/.*\.(ts|tsx)$'; then cd "$REPO/frontend" && pnpm exec tsc --noEmit --skipLibCheck 2>/dev/null || true; fi
